title: Stable and Unstable Systems
summary: This page covers system invertibility and BIBO stability. It explains that systems like y(t)=tx(t) and y(t)=d/dt x(t) are non-invertible, and provides Example 1.15 which assesses BIBO stability for three systems, showing y(t)=x²(t) is stable while y(t)=tx(t) and y(t)=d/dt x(t) are unstable.
